start: ^Agent 0x99: Mission complete. Let's discuss what happened.
debrief_location: ^[The axolotl tank bubbles quietly in the background]
^Agent 0x99: Social Fabric cell disrupted, Derek Lawson neutralized, election manipulation prevented.

b: ^Agent 0x99: Strong work. You achieved the mission goals efficiently.
^Agent 0x99: Solid. You got the job done, even if not perfectly.
^Agent 0x99: Mission complete, but there were gaps. Review your approach for next time.

moral_reflection: ^Agent 0x99: Every operation has costs. That's the weight we carry.
^Agent 0x99: But you prevented election manipulation. Innocent people's votes will count.

c-0: ^Agent 0x99: Not always. But in this case? Yes. You made the right calls.
c-1: ^Agent 0x99: Good. That uncertainty keeps you human. Keeps you questioning.

consequence_arrest: ^Agent 0x99: You chose arrest. Legal channels, proper prosecution.

b: ^Agent 0x99: Derek's cooperating with investigators. Not full immunity, but his intel is valuable.
^Agent 0x99: We've identified two other Social Fabric operatives at Viral Dynamics.
^Agent 0x99: Derek's fighting this legally. Claims whistleblower protection.
^Agent 0x99: Media attention is... complicated. But we have the evidence.

arrest_outcome: ^Agent 0x99: Viral Dynamics is under investigation. Some innocent employees are caught in the fallout.
^Agent 0x99: But the Social Fabric cell is dismantled. That's what matters.

c-1: ^Agent 0x99: You followed legal protocol. That's always defensible.

consequence_recruit: ^Agent 0x99: You recruited Derek as Asset NIGHTINGALE.
^Agent 0x99: Risky. Very risky. But if it works, we'll have unprecedented ENTROPY intel.
^Agent 0x99: Derek's feeding us information on Phase 3, other cells, coordination with Zero Day Syndicate.

c-0: ^Agent 0x99: No. Never trust a turned asset completely.
^Agent 0x99: But we can verify his intel and use it. He's valuable, even if unreliable.
c-1: ^Agent 0x99: Then Derek's dead and we lose our access. Hence "risky."

recruit_outcome: ^Agent 0x99: Asset NIGHTINGALE is your responsibility now. You turned him, you run him.
^Agent 0x99: Future missions may require coordinating with Derek. Can you handle that?
^I hope I made the right call

c-0: ^Agent 0x99: Good. This could be a major intelligence breakthrough.
c-1: ^Agent 0x99: Time will tell. But you took the bold option. I respect that.

consequence_expose: ^Agent 0x99: Every media outlet is running the story. ENTROPY operations, Viral Dynamics infiltration, election manipulation—all exposed.
^Agent 0x99: Director Netherton is furious. We don't do public disclosures.

c-0: ^Agent 0x99: Maybe. But you've made enemies inside SAFETYNET.
^Agent 0x99: Some think you're reckless. Others think you're principled.
c-1: ^Agent 0x99: I believe you. And honestly? I'm not sure you're wrong.

expose_outcome: ^Agent 0x99: Viral Dynamics is destroyed. Employees lost jobs, careers ruined.
^Agent 0x99: But ENTROPY's Social Fabric operations are now public knowledge. Harder for them to operate in shadows.
^Agent 0x99: Double-edged sword. Transparency vs. collateral damage.

c-0: ^Agent 0x99: Ask me in six months. Right now, it's too soon to know.
c-1: ^Agent 0x99: Then own it. Choices have consequences. You knew that going in.

phase_3_discussion: ^Agent 0x99: One cell down. But Phase 3 isn't stopped.
^Agent 0x99: Social Fabric was one part of a larger operation. Zero Day Syndicate, Ransomware Inc., Critical Mass—all coordinating.
^Agent 0x99: And behind them all: The Architect.
architect_mystery: ^Agent 0x99: We don't know. No one does.
^Agent 0x99: ENTROPY's leader, strategist, philosopher. Maybe one person, maybe a collective.
^Agent 0x99: Every cell reports to The Architect. Every operation traces back.

c-0: ^Agent 0x99: Cell by cell. Operation by operation. Until we can trace the pattern.
^Agent 0x99: Your mission disrupted one cell. We need hundreds more like it.
c-1: ^Agent 0x99: Maybe. But we have to try.

b: ^Agent 0x99: You said you were cautious. You were—measured, thoughtful, strategic.
^Agent 0x99: You said you were confident. You delivered on that.
^Agent 0x99: You said you were adaptable. You proved it—pivoting when needed.

next_mission: ^Agent 0x99: First mission complete. But this is just the beginning.

c-1: ^Agent 0x99: Take it. But not too long. ENTROPY doesn't wait.

debrief_conclusion: ^Agent 0x99: Remember that axolotl metaphor from the briefing? About trusting your instincts?
axolotl_callback: ^Agent 0x99: You've discovered which instincts to trust now.
^Agent 0x99: You're not a hatchling anymore. You're an agent.

c-1: ^Agent 0x99: That's the plan. One mission at a time.

mission_end: ^Agent 0x99: Get some rest. Next briefing is in 48 hours.

b: ^[OUTCOME: Derek Lawson arrested - Legal prosecution pending]
^[OUTCOME: Derek Lawson recruited as Asset NIGHTINGALE - Double agent operation active]
^[OUTCOME: Full public disclosure - ENTROPY operations exposed]
